MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. The Court took the matter off calendar.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy Belen.
